title: Receipt PDF to Excel Converter - Extract Data for Expense Tracking
metaTitle: Receipt PDF to Excel Converter | Extract Data with AI
metaDescription: Convert receipt PDFs to Excel spreadsheets with AI. Extract vendor, date, amount, and tax data automatically. Supports scanned and digital receipts.
h1: Convert Receipt PDFs to Excel for Automated Expense Tracking

hero.headline: Turn Receipt PDFs into Excel Spreadsheets Automatically
hero.subheadline: Extract vendor names, amounts, dates, and tax information from receipts into organized Excel files for expense tracking and accounting workflows.

summary: Converting receipt PDFs to Excel eliminates manual data entry for expense reporting and bookkeeping. Our AI extracts key fields like vendor, date, total amount, tax, and line items from both digital and scanned receipts, creating structured spreadsheets with one receipt per row for easy analysis and import into accounting software.
whenThisIsRelevant: Converting paper receipts to digital records
expectedOutputs: Excel files with extracted receipt data
CSV files for accounting software import
commonChallenges: Manual typing of receipt amounts and vendors
Organizing receipts by date and category
Missing receipt details in expense reports
Time-consuming data entry for multiple receipts
howItWorksSteps: Upload your receipt PDFs or images to the platform
AI identifies and extracts vendor, date, amount, and tax fields
Review the extracted data and customize fields if needed
Download your Excel file with all receipt data organized
whyPdfExcelAiFits: AI extracts receipt fields with 99%+ accuracy on clear documents
Processes multiple receipts simultaneously for batch conversion
OCR technology handles both scanned and photographed receipts
Custom field selection lets you choose relevant data points
limitations: Faded or blurry receipt images may have reduced accuracy
Handwritten receipt details are harder to extract than printed text
Thermal receipts that have faded over time may be unreadable

faq.question: Can I convert multiple receipt PDFs to Excel at once?
faq.answer: Yes, you can upload multiple receipt files for batch processing. Each receipt becomes a row in your Excel output with extracted data like vendor, date, and amount in separate columns.

faq.question: Does it work with scanned or photographed receipts?
faq.answer: Yes, our OCR technology processes scanned receipt PDFs and phone photos. The accuracy depends on image clarity and receipt condition, with clear, well-lit images producing the best results.

faq.question: What receipt data can be extracted to Excel?
faq.answer: Common fields include vendor name, transaction date, total amount, tax amount, payment method, and line items. You can customize which fields to extract based on your expense tracking needs.

faq.question: Can the Excel output be imported into accounting software?
faq.answer: Yes, the structured Excel and CSV outputs are designed for easy import into QuickBooks, Xero, and other accounting platforms. Each receipt becomes a properly formatted transaction row.

trustSignals: Files are encrypted during processing and deleted afterward
99%+ accuracy rate on clear, legible receipt documents
Supports major receipt formats from retail and restaurant transactions
Free tier available to test with your receipt documents
exampleUseCases: Converting quarterly business meal receipts for tax deduction claims
Processing employee expense receipts for reimbursement workflows
Digitizing shoebox full of paper receipts for bookkeeping
Extracting receipt data from email attachments for monthly reports
